title: Naked, Hurt & Pissed Off
overview: Anna parties a lot. She's 17 years old. When it comes to men, she's the "one night stand" kind of a girl. But then, out of the blue, she falls in love and gets pregnant. What will her conservative mom say? She also knows that it's time to tell her mom the truth about her sexual orientation. Will she still be accepted in the family? Can she still work at her mom's clinic? What will her friends say? Is she gonna keep the baby?
